message:
refactor(extent): rewrite punch_hole with per-extent deletion and add overflow tests

Extent (ffs-extent):
- Refactor punch_hole() from bulk delete to per-extent deletion: walk
  extents individually, delete each, trim against hole boundaries,
  re-insert remaining pieces, and free physical blocks per-extent
- This approach handles B-tree node splitting naturally during the
  walk instead of requiring separate split/merge passes

B-Tree (ffs-btree):
- Make trim_extents() public to expose internal extent trimming API
  needed by the refactored punch_hole implementation

Tests:
- Add test_overflow.rs with extent overflow scenario tests using
  MemBlockDevice

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
